summary.news_summary: 【テストモード】APIキーが設定されていないため、実際の要約は生成されていません。GEMINI_API_KEY環境変数を設定してください。収集された記事のタイトルのみ表示しています。
summary.opinion_summary: 【テストモード】メディアの意見分析はAPIキーが必要です。実際の運用時はGemini APIキーを設定することで、ポジティブ・ネガティブ・中立の意見分析が自動生成されます。

sentiment.positive: APIキー設定後に自動生成されます

raw_articles.title: Slack’s Slackbot can now pull your CRM data, generate charts, and send DocuSigns — all from a chat message.
raw_articles.summary: Five years and $27.7 billion after Salesforce acquired Slack, the two products are finally starting to function as a single system. On Tuesday, Slack launched an integration that connects Slackbot — the personal AI agent built into every workspace — to the entire Salesforce platform, including CRM data, Tableau analytics, Data 360 customer profiles, and a growing constellation of third-party applications, all through a single conversational prompt.The mechanism behind the expansion is a set of d

raw_articles.title: 9 Best Portable Power Stations (2026), Tested for Capacity and Size
raw_articles.summary: Whether you’re going off-grid or safeguarding against blackouts, these beefy, WIRED-tested batteries can keep the lights on.

raw_articles.title: Pickup Artist Mystery Has an AI Girlfriend
raw_articles.summary: A new book claims that Mystery, who teaches awkward men how to hit on women, had sex and smoked weed with an AI chatbot named Miss Shira Always.

raw_articles.title: Apple commits $30 billion to Broadcom for U.S. chipmaking push
raw_articles.summary: Apple is expanding its Broadcom partnership in a $30 billion-plus chipmaking agreement, its largest American manufacturing commitment to date.

raw_articles.title: OnlyFans Models Are Accidentally Making Hacked Government Websites Disappear
raw_articles.summary: Scammers are hijacking government websites to upload ads for “leaked” OnlyFans content. Thousands of copyright complaints from adult creators are helping people avoid malicious links.

raw_articles.title: What Happens if China Hacks the US Water Supply? I Went to a Secret War Game to Find Out
raw_articles.summary: Burst water mains. Evacuated hospitals. In a closed-door simulation, insurers played out their response to a mass disruption by China’s Volt Typhoon hackers—and found a nightmare scenario.

raw_articles.title: This Former DeepMind Exec Thinks the AI Arms Race Could End in Disaster
raw_articles.summary: Verity Harding tells WIRED that the US government’s nationalistic attitude toward AI is evidence that a worst-case scenario is taking shape.

raw_articles.title: OpenAI secures U.S. regulatory green light for GPT-5.6 rollout, Axios report says
SambaNova hits $11 billion valuation as investors back Nvidia chip challengers
raw_articles.summary: SambaNova is valued at $11 billion after fresh financing led by General Atlantic, as AI chip startups look to challenge Nvidia.

raw_articles.title: China warns about AI risks with Anthropic's Claude Code
raw_articles.summary: China said specific versions of Claude Code posed back-door vulnerabilities that could send sensitive information to a remote server.

raw_articles.title: Hot French startup ZML releases free product to speed inference across lots of AI chips
raw_articles.summary: ZML, a hot French AI startup endorsed by Turing Award winner Yann LeCun, has now released ZML/LLMD, software that could make running AI less costly.

raw_articles.title: This former Apple executive is betting on Shenzhen, not Silicon Valley, to create the 'next Apple'
raw_articles.summary: Startups building consumer electronics will have a better shot at becoming the next Apple in Shenzhen than in Silicon Valley, said Will Wang, CEO of China's smart-glasses startup.

raw_articles.title: AI chip maker SambaNova raises $1B at $11B valuation, 5 months after last mega round
raw_articles.summary: AI chip maker SambaNova has raised at an $11B valuation months after Intel was rumored to be trying to buy it for about $1.6 billion.

raw_articles.title: Meta just launched a new AI generator, Muse Image, and users are already pushing back over use of their photos
raw_articles.summary: The new image-generating model has numerous use cases, including advertising and decorating, and creator-based opportunities.

raw_articles.title: Meta’s new Muse Image model can pull other Instagram users into AI photos
raw_articles.summary: Meta is launching the first AI image generation model made by its Superintelligence Labs division. The Muse Image model now powers the image-making tools across the Meta AI app, Instagram, and WhatsApp, and it's coming soon to Facebook and Messenger, according to an announcement on Tuesday. It's part of the growing Muse family of AI […]
